top3.sql:
SELECT d.driver_id, COUNT(del.delivery_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(o.order_moment_delivered)) AS avg_daily_deliveries
FROM drivers d
JOIN deliveries del ON d.driver_id = del.driver_id
JOIN orders o ON del.delivery_order_id = o.delivery_order_id
WHERE del.delivery_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_moment_delivered IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.driver_id
ORDER BY avg_daily_deliveries DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT d.driver_id, AVG(delivery_count) AS avg_daily_deliveries
FROM drivers d
JOIN (
    SELECT driver_id, DATE(order_moment_delivered) AS delivery_date, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count
    FROM deliveries del
    JOIN orders ord ON del.delivery_order_id = ord.delivery_order_id
    WHERE ord.order_moment_delivered IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY driver_id, DATE(order_moment_delivered)
) daily ON d.driver_id = daily.driver_id
GROUP BY d.driver_id
ORDER BY avg_daily_deliveries DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT d.driver_id, AVG(del_count) AS avg_daily_deliveries
FROM drivers d
JOIN (
    SELECT del.driver_id, DATE(o.order_moment_delivered) AS delivery_date, COUNT(del.delivery_id) AS del_count
    FROM deliveries del
    JOIN orders o ON del.delivery_order_id = o.delivery_order_id
    WHERE del.delivery_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_moment_delivered IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY del.driver_id, DATE(o.order_moment_delivered)
) del_daily ON d.driver_id = del_daily.driver_id
GROUP BY d.driver_id
ORDER...

final.sql:
SELECT d.driver_id, COUNT(del.delivery_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(o.order_moment_delivered)) AS avg_daily_deliveries
FROM drivers d
JOIN deliveries del ON d.driver_id = del.driver_id
JOIN orders o ON del.delivery_order_id = o.delivery_order_id
WHERE del.delivery_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_moment_delivered IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.driver_id
ORDER BY avg_daily_deliveries DESC
LIMIT 5;
